name_en: 📣📣📣 [Original Leather with 🌈(Cdfmall Sanya Duty Free Store Shopping Bag] 🔥🔥 GG Retro mini tote. I absolutely love this mini tote. I am glad to be the first to get it online. It is exactly my style and a recent favorite. I previously teased it because I liked it so much. I already liked it, and seeing Song Yanfei carry it made me even more obsessed. Every brand has released a similar shape recently, but I think GG wins in terms of texture. No risk of buying a dud, just buy it. Model 671623 Dimensions 16x20x7cm
